'''âk-zh-k-ch''' ('''kakazhkechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quaeritate|quaeritate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-zh-k-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quaeritate|quaeritate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-zh-k-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kakazhkechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikazhkechoko|thikazhkechoko]] || [[word:jikazhkechoko|jikazhkechoko]] || [[word:shikazhkechoko|shikazhkechoko]] || [[word:kikazhkechoko|kikazhkechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukazhkechoko|thuthukazhkechoko]] || [[word:jujukazhkechoko|jujukazhkechoko]] || [[word:shushukazhkechoko|shushukazhkechoko]] || [[word:kukukazhkechoko|kukukazhkechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukazhkechoko|thukazhkechoko]] || [[word:jukazhkechoko|jukazhkechoko]] || [[word:shukazhkechoko|shukazhkechoko]] || [[word:kukazhkechoko|kukazhkechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukazhkechoko|thukazhkechoko]] || [[word:jukazhkechoko|jukazhkechoko]] || [[word:shukazhkechoko|shukazhkechoko]] || [[word:kukazhkechoko|kukazhkechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekazhkechoko|thekazhkechoko]] || [[word:jekazhkechoko|jekazhkechoko]] || [[word:shekazhkechoko|shekazhkechoko]] || [[word:kekazhkechoko|kekazhkechoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokazhkechoko|thokazhkechoko]] || [[word:jokazhkechoko|jokazhkechoko]] || [[word:shokazhkechoko|shokazhkechoko]] || [[word:kokazhkechoko|kokazhkechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokazhkechoko|thokazhkechoko]] || [[word:jokazhkechoko|jokazhkechoko]] || [[word:shokazhkechoko|shokazhkechoko]] || [[word:kokazhkechoko|kokazhkechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkazhkechoko|thĂŠkazhkechoko]] || [[word:jĂŠkazhkechoko|jĂŠkazhkechoko]] || [[word:shĂŠkazhkechoko|shĂŠkazhkechoko]] || [[word:kĂŠkazhkechoko|kĂŠkazhkechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakazhkechoko|thathakazhkechoko]] || [[word:jajakazhkechoko|jajakazhkechoko]] || [[word:shashakazhkechoko|shashakazhkechoko]] || [[word:kakakazhkechoko|kakakazhkechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakazhkechoko|thakazhkechoko]] || [[word:jakazhkechoko|jakazhkechoko]] || [[word:shakazhkechoko|shakazhkechoko]] || [[word:kakazhkechoko|kakazhkechoko]]
|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shakazhkechithi|shakazhkechithi]] || [[word:shakazhkechiji|shakazhkechiji]] || [[word:shakazhkechishi|shakazhkechishi]] || [[word:shakazhkechiki|shakazhkechiki]]
